matcher: tool == 'Bash' && tool_input.command matches '(npm run dev|pnpm dev|yarn dev|next dev)'

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.dumps({'decision':'block','reason':'Dev server must run in tmux for log access. Use: tmux new-session -d -s dev \"npm run dev\" && tmux attach -t dev'}))" 2>/dev/null || echo '{"decision":"allow"}'

description: Block dev servers outside tmux — ensures log access

matcher: tool == 'Bash' && tool_input.command matches '(npm install|npm ci|npm test|npx playwright|cargo build|docker build|pytest|vitest)'

hooks.command: python3 -c "import sys; print('{\"decision\":\"allow\"}'); sys.stderr.write('[Hint] Consider running long commands in tmux: tmux new-session -d -s work \"<command>\"\n')"

description: Track file writes/edits in audit trail
Track session metrics for lifecycle management
Load mode-based context (dev/research/review) on skill invocation for token reduction
